item.message: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.

item.text: I’ll verify the diff counts and marker with compact Git output.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git diff --numstat && git diff --unified=0 | awk 'BEGIN{a=0;d=0;m=0} /"'^'"\\+\\+\\+|"'^---/{next} /''^'"\\+/{a++; if(index("'$0,"FIXED-06000")) m++} /''^-/{d++} END{print "added=" a, "removed=" d, "marker=" m}'"'"
